scripts.build:win: npm run build && pkg dist/index.js -t node22-win-x64 -o ../src-tauri/binaries/sidecar-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.exe
scripts.build:linux: npm run build && pkg dist/index.js -t node22-linux-x64 -o ../src-tauri/binaries/sidecar-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
scripts.build:mac: npm run build && pkg dist/index.js -t node22-macos-x64 -o ../src-tauri/binaries/sidecar-x86_64-apple-darwin
